data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the counter lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed), but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or references to the lifecycle states of counters. The linked use case mentions the need for a counter lifecycle, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating its existence or functionality. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's coverage, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of counter lifecycle states (open, paused, closed).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the counter lifecycle states.
